name: ImagesPanel cloudchat-asset support
description: Updated ImagesPanel.tsx extractImageUrls() to match cloudchat-asset:// URLs via new CLOUDCHAT_ASSET_URL_REGEX. Previously only http/https/data URIs were matched, missing local images stored by hermes in the images panel.

name: Shared local image normalization for sidebar previews
description: Sidebar image discovery and rendering should reuse the same local-image normalization path as MarkdownRenderer so bare /tmp, ~/.hermes, file://, and cloudchat-asset image references produce previewable asset URLs and share the /tmp-to-~/.hermes fallback.
